warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Wednesday, 8 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Rabu, 8 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 6:00AM; Friday, 3 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 6:00 pagi; Jumaat, 3 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, northwestern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan and Sulu until 6:00AM; Friday, 3 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, barat laut Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 6:00 pagi; Jumaat, 3 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, northeastern part of Condore, northern part of Reef North and Palawan until Wednesday, 8 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, timur laut Condore, utara Reef North dan Palawan sehingga Rabu, 8 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar and Pokok Sena);  Perak  (Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah, Kampar, Bagan Datuk, Hilir Perak, Batang Padang and Muallim);  Terengganu  (Dungun and Kemaman);  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands, Lipis, Raub, Jerantut and Kuantan);  Selangor  (Sabak Bernam, Kuala Selangor, Klang and Kuala Langat);  Sarawak:  Sri Aman, Betong (Betong), Sibu (Selangau), Mukah (Dalat and Mukah), Kapit (Song and Kapit) and Bintulu (Tatau);  Sabah:  Interior (Kuala Penyu), Sandakan (Kinabatangan and Sandakan) and Kudat (Kudat); and  FT Labuan  until 7:00AM; Friday, 3 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar dan Pokok Sena);  Perak  (Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah, Kampar, Bagan Datuk, Hilir Perak, Batang Padang dan Muallim);  Terengganu  (Dungun dan Kemaman);  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron, Lipis, Raub, Jerantut dan Kuantan);  Selangor  (Sabak Bernam, Kuala Selangor, Klang dan Kuala Langat);  Sarawak:  Sri Aman, Betong (Betong), Sibu (Selangau), Mukah (Dalat dan Mukah), Kapit (Song dan Kapit) dan Bintulu (Tatau);  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Kuala Penyu), Sandakan (Kinabatangan dan Sandakan) dan Kudat (Kudat); dan  WP Labuan  sehingga 7:00 pagi; Jumaat, 3 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Tropical Depression Advisory (TDa)                  Time of Observation:  23:00, 02 July 2026                  Location:  Latitude 16.9 North and Longitude 110.2 East                  Movement:  West 20 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  56 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 172 km Northwest of Sanya, China.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1323 km Northwest of Kudat, Sabah.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Lekukan Tropika (TDa)                  Masa Pencerapan:  23:00, 02 Julai 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 16.9 Utara dan Longitud 110.2 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat dengan kelajuan 20 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  56 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 172 km ke Barat Laut Sanya, China.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1323 km ke Barat Laut Kudat, Sabah.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
